ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., Mayor – City of Allen) */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., mayoral, councilmember) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date the election was held */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election */,
  "election_status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, completed) */,
  "total_voters_registered" INTEGER /* Total number of voters registered for the election */,
  "total_voters_turnout" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who turned out for the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the candidate */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the candidate */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_candidates" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "election_position" TEXT /* Position the candidate is running for (e.g., mayor, councilmember) */,
  "is_winner" INTEGER /* Whether the candidate is the winner of the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id", "candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the county is located in */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the precinct is located in */,
  "precinct_population" INTEGER /* Population of the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes the candidate received */,
  "vote_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes the candidate received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting machine */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct the machine is located in */,
  "machine_type" TEXT /* Type of voting machine (e.g., electronic, paper) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_machine_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting machine result */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voting machine */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes the candidate received on the machine */,
  "vote_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes the candidate received on the machine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_machine_results_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES voting_machines ("machine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_machine_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Full name of the election official */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the election official */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the election official */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the election official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_official_elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "official_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the election official in the election (e.g., commissioner, deputy commissioner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id", "official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, election official) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., IP address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of audit */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., voting machine audit, election results audit) */,
  "audit_result" TEXT /* Result of the audit (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., voting machine type) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata (e.g., Diebold AccuVote) */,
  "metadata_description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_metadata_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the voter */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voter (e.g., male, female) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the voter (e.g., white, black, hispanic) */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income of the voter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_demographics_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct */,
  "total_voters_registered" INTEGER /* Total number of voters registered in the precinct */,
  "total_voters_turnout" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who turned out in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., voting machine usage, voter turnout) */,
  "trend_value" TEXT /* Value of the trend (e.g., 50%, 75%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_trends_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)
